# Implementation Plan: TW-0002
<!-- Generated by /plan -->

**Title:** v0.2 gap-closure ‚Äî deferred featureset to spec-complete
**Spec ID:** TW-0002
**Spec:** docs/specs/spec-TW-0002.md
**Plan size:** Large

## Task

Take every üîú/üü° capability in `docs/FEATURES.md` to ‚úÖ: comments & presence, a settings/command-palette surface, syntax colouring, sandboxed MDX execution, Mermaid + math, the in-place table grid, the fold menu, footnotes + definition lists, character-level marker reveal, virtualization + input substrate, and the benchmark/a11y hardening pass. Work ships as staged increments in the published roadmap order (triage assumption), each behind config surfaces that **already exist** in `src/types.ts` wherever possible ‚Äî the work is lighting up dormant options (`extensions.*`, `MdxOptions`, `FoldingOptions.persistKey`, `KeymapOptions`, `overscan`, `StreamOptions.smooth`), not inventing parallel ones. Comments/presence/settings are the only genuinely new API surfaces (no types exist today).

## Approach

Eleven phases (A‚ÄìK) in the roadmap order, each independently shippable. Phases A‚ÄìH extend the current textarea-based architecture through existing extension points: the parser's block/inline dispatch chains, the renderer's exhaustive switches (compile-enforced ‚Äî new AST kinds break the build until rendered), and the React editor's block model. Phase I+J is the coupled engine upgrade (custom view + input sink + virtualization + caret-level reveal + incremental reparse) that replaces unified mode's internals behind unchanged props. Phase K closes with benchmarks, a11y, bundle budget, and doc flips. All security invariants hold throughout: `renderToHtml` stays the sanitizing boundary; anything executable (MDX, Mermaid) runs only in an opaque-origin sandboxed iframe; zero runtime deps (wasm transform is the one conceded, *optional peer* boundary).

## Reference implementation

- **Visuals:** `demo/design-prototype.html` is canonical for every surface (comments sidebar/composer at its lines ~274‚Äì307/753‚Äì800, fold menu `openFoldMenu` ~775‚Äì785, table grid ~216‚Äì222/635‚Äì639, settings panel ~412‚Äì421, MDX callout/chart ~517‚Äì628, streaming states ~925‚Äì975).
- **Code patterns:** parser builders in `src/core/parser.ts` (e.g. `buildTable`/`isTableStartAt` `parser.ts:160-166` as the lookahead-block template); pure command transforms in `src/core/commands.ts`; widgetized block rendering + `SourceArea` commit splice in `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx:302-315`; e2e idioms in `e2e/editor.spec.ts` (scope under `getByTestId('editor')`, drill by `tw-*` classes).

## Requirements & Decisions

### Functional (from the spec's gap list)

1. **Comments (C20‚ÄìC22):** selection ‚Üí floating action popup ‚Üí composer; anchored highlight decorations; sidebar with replies, emoji reactions, resolve/reopen; anchors survive edits via position mapping.
2. **Presence (C23):** avatar row + live collaborator cursors/selections rendered as decorations; host supplies all data (data-in/events-out; library stores nothing ‚Äî triage assumption).
3. **Settings surface:** live-toggle panel (mode, toolbar, folding, theme, extensions) + ‚åòK command palette enumerating and running every command; host-extensible; session-only persistence (triage assumption).
4. **Syntax colouring:** native zero-dep tokenizer for js/ts/jsx/tsx, json, css, html, md, python, bash, sql; plain-text fallback; behind `extensions.syntaxHighlight`.
5. **MDX execution (C12):** transform adapters (`wasm-esbuild` | `wasm-swc` | `constrained` | fn) in a worker ‚Üí evaluate in opaque-origin sandboxed iframe (`allow-scripts`, never `allow-same-origin` ‚Äî the type already forbids it, `types.ts:74`); component map; off by default (triage assumption).
6. **Mermaid + math (C10):** `lang === 'mermaid'` fences ‚Üí sandbox-rendered diagram; `$‚Ä¶$`/`$$‚Ä¶$$` ‚Üí pluggable KaTeX-compatible engine. Engines host-supplied, never bundled; without an engine, source renders as today (triage assumptions).
7. **Table grid (C7):** in-place grid editing with Tab/arrow nav, add/remove row/column, alignment; each cell edit is a scoped splice against that cell's exact source range.
8. **Fold menu (C5 remainder):** per-heading menu ‚Äî Heading 1‚Äì6, Toggle Folding, Fold/Unfold All, Copy Link; `folding.persistKey` + `showGutter` honored.
9. **Footnotes + definition lists (C9 remainder):** GFM footnotes (`[^id]` refs, `[^id]:` definition blocks, back-links) and definition lists, GitHub-style rendering (triage assumption).
10. **Character-level reveal (true C1):** unified mode reveals raw markers only around the caret (SPEC ¬ß5.2 active-range algorithm + click-settle debounce); **preview mode keeps block click-to-edit** (triage assumption).
11. **Virtualization + input substrate:** viewport-bounded DOM with measured heights and scroll anchoring; hidden input sink for keys/IME/composition; `overscan` honored; incremental (dirty-block) reparse so the published performance claims become true.
12. **Streaming completion:** light up the dormant `AnticipationOptions.links/listItems/tables` flags and `StreamOptions.smooth`; surface `smooth`/`componentFallback` on `<StreamingPreview>`.
13. **Benchmarks + a11y (SPEC ¬ß10 / Phase 6):** reproducible keystroke-to-paint + cold-parse harness vs a CodeMirror 6 baseline; bundle-size budget in CI; ARIA/screen-reader pass; numbers published even where targets are missed.

### Constraints & Decisions (locked by spec + triage)

- Zero runtime deps; `react`/`react-dom` stay optional peers; wasm transform is opt-in and host-loaded.
- The string is the source of truth; every mutation is a `{from,to,insert}` splice.
- `src/types.ts` is semver ‚Äî extend only, no renames.
- React off the per-keystroke path (Phase I/J's view is vanilla DOM; React mounts widget islands via portals).
- Failed diagram/component renders show an inline error card, never break editing.
- Emoji reactions: the demo's fixed set `['üëç','üéØ','üëÄ','üéâ']` (`demo/main.tsx:46`).

## Steps

> Baseline facts the steps rely on (verified): `extensions`, `keymap`, `overscan`, `theme.tokens`, `FoldingOptions.persistKey/showGutter`, `onModeChange` are accepted-but-ignored today (`TypewrightEditor.tsx:89-102,130`); `parse()` is a full reparse (`parser.ts:910-914`); `TextDoc.mapOffset` exists but is dead code (`text.ts:122-143`); `collectMarkers`/`hiddenMarkers` already compute **marker-level** ranges (`unified.ts:27-108`) but miss fence/blockquote/table markers; commands are a closed 15-id union with **no registry** and shortcuts bypass `applyCommand` via `wrapSelection` (`TypewrightEditor.tsx:56-84` ‚Äî ‚åòB double-wraps while the toolbar toggles).

### Phase A ‚Äî Comments & presence (C20‚ÄìC23)

#### A1. Public types for comments/presence
- **File:** `src/types.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Add `CommentThread { id; anchor: {from,to}; quote?; author; createdAt; body; reactions?: Record<string,string[]>; resolved?; replies: CommentReply[] }`, `CommentReply`, `PresencePeer { id; name; color?; cursor?: {from,to} }`, and `CommentsOptions { enabled; threads: CommentThread[]; me?: {id;name}; onCreate?; onReply?; onReact?; onResolve?; onDelete? }` (controlled data-in/events-out ‚Äî mirror the controlled `value`/`onChange` idiom). Add `EditorConfig.comments?: boolean | CommentsOptions` and `EditorConfig.presence?: PresencePeer[]`.
- **Verify:** `pnpm typecheck`; no existing type renamed.

#### A2. Anchor maintenance in core
- **File:** `src/core/comments.ts` (new) + `src/core/index.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Create/Modify
- **Details:** `mapAnchor(anchor, change: DocChange): {from,to} | null` built on `mapOffset` (`src/core/text.ts:122-143` ‚Äî first real consumer of the dead code); collapse-to-null when the anchored range is fully deleted. Export from the core barrel (`src/core/index.ts`).
- **Reference:** `mapOffset` assoc semantics in `text.ts` + its tests in `text.test.ts`.
- **Verify:** unit tests: anchor survives insert-above/insert-inside/delete-overlap; nulls on full deletion.

#### A3. Selection popup + composer + highlights in the editor
- **File:** `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** When `comments` enabled and a selection exists in a `SourceArea` (or a DOM selection over a rendered block), show a floating popup (Comment action) ‚Üí composer. On submit call `onCreate({anchor, quote, body})`. Render highlights by wrapping rendered HTML: post-process each block's `renderNode` output using thread anchors that intersect `[b.from, b.to]` (map anchor ‚Üí offsets within the block source, then wrap the corresponding rendered text via a `<mark class="tw-comment">` ‚Äî walk text nodes of the block's DOM after mount rather than string-injecting, to keep the sanitizer untouched). Keep anchors current by mapping through every commit's `DocChange` (the splice at `TypewrightEditor.tsx:302-315` already produces one) and emitting via an `onAnchorsChange`-style callback inside `CommentsOptions.onCreate`-adjacent events.
- **Reference:** design prototype `#selpop`/`#composer` (~lines 297‚Äì307, 788‚Äì800); FLIP/active-block plumbing already in `UnifiedEditor`.
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî select text in a revealed block ‚Üí Comment ‚Üí thread appears; editing text above the anchor keeps the highlight on the same words.

#### A4. Comments sidebar + presence UI
- **File:** `src/react/CommentsSidebar.tsx` (new), `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx`, `src/react/index.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Create/Modify
- **Details:** Right-docked, hidden-until-toggled sidebar (triage assumption): threads with quote, replies, reaction chips (fixed emoji set), resolve/reopen; click-thread scrolls to + flashes its highlight. Presence: avatar row + remote cursors/selections as absolutely-positioned overlays on rendered blocks (offset ‚Üí DOM position via the same text-node walk as A3). Style via the injected stylesheet (`STYLE_ID` block at `TypewrightEditor.tsx:574+`).
- **Reference:** demo mock thread markup `.cthread/.cquote/.reacts` (`demo/main.tsx:188-204`) and prototype resolved-state styling.
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî reply, react, resolve fire the callbacks; sidebar toggle shows count badge.

#### A5. Demo: replace mock comments/presence with the real surfaces
- **File:** `demo/main.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Delete the local `Thread` mock (`demo/main.tsx:37-46,79,93-99,188-204`) and presence chips (`:122-124`); pass `comments={{threads, onCreate, onReply, onReact, onResolve}}` + `presence` into `<TypewrightEditor>` with demo-local state as the "host transport". Keep `SEED_COMMENTS` as initial data.
- **Verify:** `pnpm e2e` green; comments tab drives the real sidebar.

### Phase B ‚Äî Command registry, keymap, settings + palette

#### B1. Enumerable command registry in core
- **File:** `src/core/commands.ts`, `src/core/index.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Add `COMMANDS: Record<Command, { label: string; kbd?: string; group: 'inline'|'block'|'insert' }>` beside the union (single source of truth unifying the three unlinked definitions: the union, `TB_GROUPS` at `TypewrightEditor.tsx:192-213`, and `handleShortcut` at `:66-84`). Add `heading4|heading5|heading6` to the `Command` union + `applyLinePrefix` cases (needed by the fold menu, G2) ‚Äî the `never` guard at `commands.ts:179-181` enforces completeness. Export `COMMANDS`.
- **Verify:** unit tests for heading4‚Äì6 toggling; typecheck.

#### B2. Honor `KeymapOptions`; route shortcuts through `applyCommand`
- **File:** `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Replace `handleShortcut`'s `wrapSelection` calls (`:66-84`) with `applyCommand` dispatch via the registry (fixes ‚åòB double-wrap vs toolbar-toggle inconsistency). Build the active binding map from `keymap.preset` (`'none'` ‚Üí no bindings) + `keymap.bindings` overrides (`"Mod-b" ‚Üí command id`, per `types.ts:115-120`). Rebuild `TB_GROUPS` from `COMMANDS`.
- **Verify:** unit-ish e2e: ‚åòB twice returns to unwrapped text; `keymap={{preset:'none'}}` disables shortcuts.

#### B3. Settings panel + command palette
- **File:** `src/react/SettingsSurface.tsx` (new), `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx`, `src/types.ts`, `src/react/index.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Create/Modify
- **Details:** `EditorConfig.settings?: boolean | SettingsOptions` (new type: `{ enabled; commands?: Array<{id;label;run:()=>void}> }` for host-extensible palette entries). Panel: live toggles for mode (calls `onModeChange` ‚Äî finally wiring the dead event at `types.ts:181`), toolbar docked/floating, folding, theme appearance, and each extension; session-state only. Palette: ‚åòK/Ctrl+K overlay listing `COMMANDS` (+ host entries) with fuzzy filter; Enter runs via the same `applyCmd` path (`TypewrightEditor.tsx:125-127`). When `mode` is uncontrolled-by-host, keep an internal mode state that props seed (mirror the `value`/`defaultValue` controlled/uncontrolled idiom at `:104-106`).
- **Reference:** prototype Setup pane toggles (`demo/main.tsx:164-186` chrome + design-prototype settings panel ~412‚Äì421).
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî ‚åòK opens palette, running "Bold" affects the focused source; toggling theme in the panel restyles live.

#### B4. Demo: real settings replace the mock toggle list
- **File:** `demo/main.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Drop `EXT_KEYS`' `real:false` flashes (`demo/main.tsx:64-70,167-175`); pass `settings` and wire the toggles to real props (extensions now do things from Phase C on).
- **Verify:** e2e updated; no "deferred" toasts remain.

### Phase C ‚Äî Syntax colouring (native, zero-dep)

#### C1. Tokenizer + themes
- **File:** `src/core/highlight.ts` (new), `src/core/index.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** `highlightToHtml(lang, code): string` (returns **escaped** HTML spans, `tw-tok-*` classes). Small hand-written line tokenizers (keywords/strings/comments/numbers/punctuation is enough ‚Äî not full grammars) for js/ts/jsx/tsx, json, css, html, md, python, bash, sql; unknown lang ‚Üí escaped plain text. Split the info string on whitespace ‚Äî `lang` is the *whole* info string today (`parser.ts:236`), so `js {1,3}` must resolve to `js`. Colour via CSS vars in the injected stylesheet (both themes).
- **Verify:** unit tests per language incl. XSS strings inside code (`<script>` stays escaped); snapshot a mixed fence.

#### C2. Wire into the renderer behind the flag
- **File:** `src/core/render.ts`, `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** The single choke point is the `codeBlock` case (`render.ts:156-161`): add a `RenderOptions { highlight?: (lang, code) => string }` param threaded through `renderToHtml`/`renderNode` (default: current escaping ‚Äî headless behaviour unchanged). The React layer passes `highlightToHtml` when `extensions.syntaxHighlight` is enabled ‚Äî the first prop to actually read `extensions` (`TypewrightEditor.tsx:89-102` destructuring).
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî fenced `ts` block shows coloured tokens in unified/read modes; disabled flag renders exactly as today.

### Phase D ‚Äî MDX execution (sandboxed)

#### D1. New `typewright/mdx` entry + build wiring
- **File:** `tsup.config.ts`, `package.json` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Add entry `'mdx/index': 'src/mdx/index.ts'` (`tsup.config.ts:4-8`) and an `"./mdx"` exports block mirroring `./streaming` (`package.json:56-60`). Worker code ships **inlined as a string ‚Üí Blob URL** (no asset pipeline in tsup; avoids a separate worker entry + URL-resolution burden on consumers).
- **Verify:** `pnpm build` emits `dist/mdx/index.{js,cjs,d.ts}`; `node -e "require('typewright/mdx')"` style smoke via the dist.

#### D2. Transform adapters (worker)
- **File:** `src/mdx/transform.ts` (new) ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** Implement `MdxTransform` resolution (`types.ts:63-67`): `'wasm-esbuild'`/`'wasm-swc'` dynamically `import()` the host-installed optional peer (`esbuild-wasm` / `@swc/wasm-web`) ‚Äî clear error if absent, never bundled; `'constrained'` = built-in zero-dep transform for a restricted subset (JSX elements with literal/identifier props + `{expression}` interpolation ‚Üí `h()` calls; **no** arbitrary statements); function = host-supplied. Run in the Blob worker, debounced; result is plain JS text.
- **Verify:** unit tests for the constrained transform (accepted subset + rejection cases); fn adapter passthrough.

#### D3. Opaque-origin sandbox host
- **File:** `src/sandbox/host.ts` (new, shared with Phase E) ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** `createSandbox(opts: SandboxOptions)` ‚Üí hidden `iframe srcdoc sandbox="allow-scripts"` (opaque origin; `allowSameOrigin` is type-forbidden, `types.ts:69-80`), strict CSP baked into srcdoc (extendable via `opts.csp`), `postMessage` RPC: `{id, kind:'evaluate'|'render-mermaid', payload}` ‚Üí `{id, html|height|error}`. Host messages brokered via `opts.onHostMessage`. Rendered component output stays **inside the iframe** (the iframe itself is the widget) ‚Äî compiled output is never innerHTML'd into the host tree (spec invariant).
- **Verify:** unit (jsdom) message-protocol tests + e2e escape attempts: sandboxed code cannot touch `parent.document`/storage; `javascript:` URL inside component output is inert.

#### D4. Editor wiring: mdxFlow blocks render live
- **File:** `src/mdx/index.ts` (new), `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Create/Modify
- **Details:** When `extensions.mdx` is enabled *and* a transform is configured: blocks with `variant === 'mdxFlow'` (`parser.ts:144-150`; raw source in `node.value`, anchor via `node.from/to` ‚Äî `parser.ts:480-492`) render as an iframe widget island instead of the escaped `<pre>` (`render.ts:166-168` stays the default). ESM `import`/`export` lines feed the sandbox module scope; the `components` map (`MdxOptions.components`) is serialized as render instructions (constrained path) or bridged via RPC. Compile errors ‚Üí inline error card (`tw-error-card`), editing never blocks (debounce + worker). Known limitation to accept: `buildHtml` consumes until the first blank line without JSX tag balancing (`parser.ts:485-488`) ‚Äî document it; multi-paragraph JSX bodies are out of the constrained subset.
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî demo doc's `<Callout>` renders live from a demo-supplied component map; removing the transform config falls back to escaped source; error card on malformed JSX.

### Phase E ‚Äî Mermaid + math

#### E1. Mermaid via the shared sandbox
- **File:** `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` (+ `src/sandbox/host.ts`) ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** `extensions.mermaid` enabled + host-supplied engine (extend `MermaidOptions` with `getEngine?: () => Promise<unknown>` or a script URL loaded *inside the sandbox*): `codeBlock` nodes with `lang === 'mermaid'` (all data already on the node ‚Äî `parser.ts:236,257`; hook point `render.ts:156-161`) render as a sandbox widget, memoized by source, debounced on edit; no engine ‚Üí today's plain fence (triage assumption).
- **Verify:** e2e (demo loads mermaid into the sandbox): flowchart renders; syntax error ‚Üí error card; toggling the extension off restores the fence.

#### E2. Math parse + pluggable engine
- **File:** `src/core/parser.ts`, `src/core/ast.ts`, `src/core/render.ts`, `src/core/unified.ts`, `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** New inline node `math {from,to,value,display:boolean}`: `$` trigger branch after the backtick branch (`parser.ts:851-859`), `tryMath` modeled on `tryCode` (`parser.ts:618-645` ‚Äî unterminated ‚Üí null ‚Üí literal text); `$$‚Ä¶$$` display blocks via a block-dispatch branch. Update the three registries: `Inline` union (`ast.ts:78-87`), `INLINE_TYPES` (`ast.ts:187-197` ‚Äî runtime Set, silent if missed), `childrenOf` if needed (`ast.ts:213-236`); renderer cases (compile-forced by the `never` guards, `render.ts:131-135,169-172`) default to escaped source styled `tw-math-src`. With `extensions.math` + a host engine (`MathOptions.engine: 'katex'|'custom'` + a `render?: (src, display) => string` field ‚Äî engine output sanitized or sandbox-rendered), replace with rendered math. Add `$` markers to `collectMarkers` (`unified.ts:27-94`) so unified mode reveals them.
- **Verify:** parser unit tests (gated: mathless parse unchanged when flag off ‚Äî gate at parse options like `gfm`); render fallback + engine path; e2e inline `$e=mc^2$` renders via demo-supplied KaTeX.

### Phase F ‚Äî In-place table grid (C7)

#### F1. Cell-exact offsets + serialization helpers
- **File:** `src/core/parser.ts` (verify), `src/core/table.ts` (new) ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** Confirm `TableCell` nodes carry exact `{from,to}` (offset-exactness contract; `buildTable` `parser.ts:461-478`) ‚Äî if header/alignment rows lack them, add. Pure helpers: `cellSourceRange(table, r, c)`, `addRow/addColumn/removeRow/removeColumn/setAlignment(text, table, ‚Ä¶) ‚Üí {text, selection}` returning full-table splices (structural ops rewrite the whole table block `[table.from, table.to]`; single-cell edits splice only that cell's range).
- **Verify:** property tests: random grid edits round-trip parse‚Üímutate‚Üíreparse with identical structure; alignment row preserved.

#### F2. Grid widget in the editor
- **File:** `src/react/TableGrid.tsx` (new), `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Create/Modify
- **Details:** In unified/preview modes, table blocks render as a grid of contentEditable cells (replacing the static `renderNode` HTML for that block only): cell blur/Enter commits a scoped splice via `onChange` (same `DocChange` shape as `TypewrightEditor.tsx:302-315`); Tab/Shift-Tab/arrow navigation between cells; Escape exits to block level; a compact hover toolbar for add/remove row/column + alignment (drives F1 helpers); Esc/blur outside ‚Üí re-render from source. Keep clicking the block *border* to fall back to raw-source editing (source stays reachable).
- **Reference:** prototype grid + contextual table tools (~lines 216‚Äì222, 635‚Äì639).
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî edit a cell, value persists in edit-mode source; Tab walks cells; add-column updates every row + alignment row; markdown stays canonical.

### Phase G ‚Äî Fold menu + folding options

#### G1. Honor `FoldingOptions` (persistKey, showGutter)
- **File:** `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Parse `folding` as `boolean | FoldingOptions` (today only booleans work ‚Äî `:130`). `persistKey` ‚Üí persist the folded-set (by heading source offset ‚Üí re-anchor by heading text hash on load) in `localStorage` (`types.ts:97` documents exactly this); `showGutter:false` hides chevrons.
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî fold, reload page, fold survives with `persistKey`.

#### G2. Fold menu
- **File:** `src/react/FoldMenu.tsx` (new), `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Create/Modify
- **Details:** Chevron click (or a dedicated `‚ãØ` affordance next to it) opens a popover: **Heading 1‚Äì6** (runs `heading1‚Ä¶heading6` commands from B1 against that heading's line via a scoped splice), **Toggle Folding**, **Fold All Headers** / **Unfold All Headers** (fold-set = all `headingFoldRanges(doc)` ‚Äî `fold.ts:29-53`), **Copy Link to here** (GitHub-style slug of the heading text ‚Üí `#slug` copied to clipboard ‚Äî triage assumption: host-page anchor). Keyboard accessible (arrow keys + Enter, Escape closes).
- **Reference:** prototype `openFoldMenu` (~775‚Äì785) incl. ‚åò1‚Äì6 kbd hints.
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî set H2‚ÜíH3 rewrites `##`‚Üí`###`; fold-all collapses every section; copy-link puts `#slug` on the clipboard.

### Phase H ‚Äî Footnotes + definition lists

#### H1. Parser: footnote defs/refs + definition lists
- **File:** `src/core/parser.ts`, `src/core/ast.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Block: `isFootnoteDef` branch **between `parser.ts:553` and `:554`** (before the paragraph fallback; `[^id]:` doesn't collide with `ITEM_RE` `parser.ts:101`), registered in `startsBlock` (`:169-180`) and `startsOtherBlock` (`:183-193`) so defs interrupt paragraphs/lazy continuations; node `footnoteDef {id, children}`. Definition list: `isDefListStartAt(lines, i)` lookahead branch just before the table branch, copying the `isTableStartAt` pattern (`:160-166`); nodes `defList/defItem {term, definitions}`. Inline: `tryFootnoteRef` **before** `tryLink` inside the `[` branch (`parser.ts:878` ‚Äî `tryLink` would swallow `[^id]` shapes); node `footnoteRef {id}`. Offsets via `abs()` (`parser.ts:601`). Update `Block`/`Inline` unions (`ast.ts:166-174, 78-87`), `INLINE_TYPES` (`:187-197`), `childrenOf` (`:213-236` ‚Äî containers, or `walk()` silently skips children). Containers get these for free via the recursive `parseBlocks` (`parser.ts:307,376`).
- **Verify:** parser unit tests: defs in blockquotes/lists; ref-without-def and def-without-ref degrade gracefully; existing 310-line parser suite untouched.

#### H2. Renderer + unified markers
- **File:** `src/core/render.ts`, `src/core/unified.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** GitHub-style rendering (triage assumption): refs ‚Üí `<sup><a href="#fn-id">` superscripts; defs collected into a `<section class="tw-footnotes"><ol>` at document end with back-links; `<dl>/<dt>/<dd>` for definition lists. The `never` guards force the new cases. Add footnote-ref markers (`[^`, `]`) and def-list `:` markers to `collectMarkers` (`unified.ts:27-94`).
- **Verify:** render unit tests incl. XSS in footnote bodies; e2e ‚Äî footnote renders + back-link round-trips; FEATURES.md row flips.

### Phase I+J ‚Äî Engine view: virtualization, input substrate, caret-level reveal, incremental reparse

*The coupled pair (spec items 9‚Äì10). Replaces unified mode's internals behind the same props; `preview` keeps the current block click-to-edit `UnifiedEditor`.*

#### IJ1. Transactions: wire `TextDoc` in
- **File:** `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx`, `src/core/text.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Route all commits (block splice `:302-315`, command apply `:499-509`, cell/grid edits) through `TextDoc.apply` so every mutation yields a canonical `DocChange` consumed by comment anchors (A2), fold persistence (G1), and the incremental parser (IJ4). No behaviour change ‚Äî this is the plumbing unification.
- **Verify:** existing unit + e2e suites stay green.

#### IJ2. Hidden input sink + caret/selection rendering
- **File:** `src/core/view/input.ts`, `src/core/view/caret.ts` (new dir `src/core/view/`) ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** The SPEC ¬ß4.4 substrate: a single hidden `<textarea>` sink positioned at the caret capturing keystrokes, paste, and **composition events** (IME text enters the model only on `compositionend`; during composition, render the in-progress string inline). Selection drawn as overlay rects; caret as a positioned element. Grapheme-aware horizontal motion (`Intl.Segmenter`, platform-provided). This is the make-or-break layer ‚Äî build + verify standalone before layering the rest (plan-TW-0001 Phase 0 gate applies).
- **Verify:** Playwright: typing, selection drag, ‚åòA/‚åòC/‚åòV, undo/redo; IME composition scripted via CDP `Input.imeSetComposition` for CJK; screen-reader smoke (focusable region announces content).

#### IJ3. Virtualized line view
- **File:** `src/core/view/view.ts` (new) ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** Materialize only lines intersecting viewport ¬± `overscan` (finally honoring `EditorConfig.overscan`, `types.ts:175`); height-reserving placeholders from measured+cached line heights; scroll anchoring keeps the caret line stable. Vanilla DOM (React only for widget islands via portals ‚Äî table grids, sandboxes mount into decoration holes).
- **Verify:** unit (jsdom) window math; e2e ‚Äî 1 MB doc scrolls with bounded DOM node count (assert `< N` rendered rows) and typing stays responsive.

#### IJ4. Incremental (dirty-block) reparse
- **File:** `src/core/parser.ts` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** `parseIncremental(prevDoc, prevSrc, change, nextSrc): Document` ‚Äî identify blocks overlapping `[change.from, change.to]` plus one-block look-around (fence/paragraph merge cases), re-run `parseBlocks` on that slice, re-offset untouched nodes by the length delta. Full `parse()` stays the fallback and the correctness oracle.
- **Verify:** property test ‚Äî for random docs + random edits, `parseIncremental` deep-equals full `parse(nextSrc)`; instrumentation asserts only edited block(s) rebuilt.

#### IJ5. Caret-level marker reveal (true C1)
- **File:** `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx` + `src/core/view/` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Unified mode renders each line through `renderInline` with marker spans; `hiddenMarkers(doc, selection)` (`unified.ts:102-108` ‚Äî the algorithm already exists and is tested) decides which marker ranges collapse (`display:none` spans) vs reveal (monospace `tw-syntax` styling) around the caret ¬±1. First **extend `collectMarkers` coverage** to the missing constructs: fence ` ``` ` lines, blockquote `>` prefixes, table pipes (`unified.ts:27-94` gap list). Apply the SPEC ¬ß5.2 click-settle debounce (~40 ms) before the render‚Üíraw DOM shift so click caret placement is stable. Cache `collectMarkers` per parse (it currently re-walks the AST per call ‚Äî `unified.ts:102`).
- **Verify:** e2e ‚Äî caret inside `**bold**` shows the asterisks, one line down they hide; clicking mid-word places the caret on that word (no jump); fold, tables, comments still work in the new view.

### Phase K ‚Äî Streaming completion, benchmarks, a11y, docs

#### K1. Light up dormant streaming options
- **File:** `src/streaming/anticipate.ts`, `src/streaming/index.ts`, `src/react/StreamingPreview.tsx` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Links: candidate branch in `findOpenRun` (after the code block, ~`anticipate.ts:101`) for unclosed `[`/`](‚Ä¶` tails. List items + table rows: line-shape predicates beside `isFormingJsx` (`:116-118`), wired into `hasTrailing` (`:120-123`) and rendered in `renderActiveLine` (`:126-138`) ‚Äî partial `| a | b` renders an in-progress row (table needs the committed/active multi-line split like the fence path, `:176-184`). `_`-emphasis parity alongside `*` (`:104-108`). Smoothing: implement in `createStreamController` between accumulation and `emit()` (`src/streaming/index.ts:36-43` ‚Äî the `void options` placeholder at `:33`): reveal-cursor advanced at `charsPerSecond`, `end()` flushes. Surface `smooth` + `componentFallback` as `<StreamingPreview>` props (`StreamingPreview.tsx:17-26`).
- **Verify:** unit tests per new construct (promote-on-complete, never-reflow rule); e2e ‚Äî streamed table forms row-by-row without jitter; smooth mode reveals steadily.

#### K2. Benchmark harness + published numbers
- **File:** `bench/` (new: `bench/docs/*.md` fixtures, `bench/keystroke.bench.ts`, `bench/cold-parse.bench.ts`), `package.json` ‚Äî **Action:** Create
- **Details:** Fixed workloads per SPEC ¬ß10 (5‚Äì50 KB mixed docs, 1 MB doc); measure keystroke-to-paint (Playwright + `performance.now` around dispatch‚Üípaint via `requestAnimationFrame`) and cold parse (vitest bench). Baseline: CodeMirror 6 (+ `@codemirror/lang-markdown`) as **devDependencies** in the bench only ‚Äî never shipped. `pnpm bench` script. Publish `docs/BENCHMARKS.md` with real numbers, honest per the spec ("published even where targets are missed").
- **Verify:** `pnpm bench` runs reproducibly; BENCHMARKS.md names workloads + competitor versions.

#### K3. Bundle budget + a11y pass
- **File:** `package.json` / CI script, `src/react/TypewrightEditor.tsx`, `src/core/view/` ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** `pnpm size` script asserting gzip budgets per entry (core headless smallest; fail over budget). A11y: roles/labels on toolbar buttons, fold menu (menu/menuitem), palette (combobox/listbox), sidebar (complementary); focus trapping in popovers; `prefers-reduced-motion` respected in new animations (pattern already in the injected CSS); virtualized doc exposes content to screen readers (off-screen text in the accessibility tree via the sink's mirror or `aria-owns` strategy chosen in IJ2).
- **Verify:** axe-core pass in an e2e spec over each new surface; size script green in CI.

#### K4. Docs + demo + release flips
- **File:** `docs/FEATURES.md`, `README.md`, `demo/main.tsx`, `e2e/editor.spec.ts` (+ new spec files per phase) ‚Äî **Action:** Modify
- **Details:** Flip every üîú/üü° row shipped by each phase as it lands (not in one batch); update README's deferred list + Highlights; demo exercises every new surface (it is the e2e target ‚Äî new tests follow the `getByTestId('editor')` + `tw-*` idioms). Bump minor version per shipped phase group (staged releases, triage assumption).
- **Verify:** FEATURES.md has no üîú/üü° rows left at the end; `pnpm test && pnpm e2e && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build` all green.

## Edge cases

- **Comment anchor vs block rewrite:** command applies replace the whole block text (`{from:0,to:len}` change at `TypewrightEditor.tsx:507`) ‚Äî map anchors through the *real* minimal diff or anchors will null out; compute a trimmed diff before mapping (IJ1 makes this canonical).
- **`buildHtml` blank-line termination** (`parser.ts:485-488`): JSX with internal blank lines splits into two blocks ‚Äî document as a constrained-subset limitation (D4), don't half-fix with tag balancing.
- **`MAX_VALUE` 1 MB cap** (`parser.ts:55`) can silently truncate what the MDX executor sees ‚Äî surface a "too large" error card instead of executing truncated source.
- **Fold persistence across edits:** offsets drift; re-anchor persisted folds by heading-text hash, drop unmatched (G1).
- **Sandbox iframe pooling:** many mermaid/MDX islands ‚Üí one shared sandbox with per-widget render targets, not an iframe per block (SPEC ¬ß16 open question ‚Äî decide for the shared model; off-screen widgets release their render slots).
- **`vitest` runs in node env** (`vitest.config.ts:4-7`): DOM-touching units (sandbox host, view) need `// @vitest-environment jsdom` per file ‚Äî don't flip the global env (parser/render perf tests rely on node).
- **Footnote refs in table cells** (inline parse inside cells) must not emit duplicate back-link ids ‚Äî suffix by occurrence.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Selecting text offers Comment; a created thread highlights its exact range, appears in the sidebar with working replies/reactions/resolve, and the highlight stays on the same words after inserting a paragraph above it.
- [ ] Presence peers passed as props render avatars and live remote cursors at the correct text positions.
- [ ] ‚åòK opens a palette listing every command; running "Bold" from it toggles the live selection; `keymap={{preset:'none'}}` disables all shortcuts; ‚åòB pressed twice returns the original text.
- [ ] The settings panel switches mode/toolbar/folding/theme/extensions live and fires `onModeChange`.
- [ ] A ` ```ts ` fence renders coloured tokens with `extensions.syntaxHighlight` on, and identical-to-today escaped output with it off; `<script>` inside any fence never executes.
- [ ] With a configured transform + component map, `<Callout type="info">` renders live inside a sandboxed iframe; sandboxed code cannot reach `parent.document` or storage (asserted in e2e); no transform configured ‚Üí escaped source exactly as v0.1.
- [ ] A `mermaid` fence renders a diagram when the demo supplies the engine, an inline error card on bad syntax, and a plain fence with the extension off; `$‚Ä¶$` renders via a host engine and falls back to styled source without one.
- [ ] Editing a table cell writes only that cell's source range (verified via edit-mode source); Tab/arrows navigate cells; add/remove row/column and alignment changes round-trip to canonical GFM.
- [ ] The heading menu sets H1‚ÄìH6 (rewriting the `#` run), toggles/folds/unfolds all, and copies a `#slug` link; folds survive reload under `persistKey`.
- [ ] `[^1]` + `[^1]: note` render GitHub-style with working back-links; definition lists render as `<dl>`; both degrade to plain text when malformed.
- [ ] In unified mode the caret inside `**bold**` reveals the asterisks and they hide when the caret leaves ‚Äî per marker, not per block; clicking rendered text places the caret without jump; preview mode still block-edits.
- [ ] A 1 MB document keeps a bounded DOM (assert rendered-row count) and responsive typing; IME composition (CJK via CDP) commits correct text; `parseIncremental` equals full parse on randomized property tests.
- [ ] Streaming anticipates forming links, list items, and table rows; confirmed content never reflows; `smooth` reveals at the configured rate.
- [ ] `pnpm bench` produces keystroke-to-paint + cold-parse numbers vs named CodeMirror 6 versions on fixed workloads, published in `docs/BENCHMARKS.md`.
- [ ] axe-core passes on toolbar, fold menu, palette, sidebar, and grid; the size script enforces per-entry gzip budgets in CI.
- [ ] `docs/FEATURES.md` contains no üîú/üü° rows; README/demo updated; all of `pnpm test`, `pnpm e2e`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm build` green.

## Testing

- **Unit (vitest, node):** parser additions (footnotes/def-lists/math/inline-JSX ordering vs `tryLink`), highlight tokenizers (incl. XSS), table helpers (property: random-edit round-trip), anchor mapping, constrained transform accept/reject, anticipation constructs, incremental-vs-full parse property test. DOM-touching units (`sandbox/host`, `core/view`) use `// @vitest-environment jsdom`.
- **e2e (Playwright, existing demo target):** one spec file per phase following `e2e/editor.spec.ts` idioms; sandbox-escape assertions (D3); IME via CDP (IJ2); axe-core sweep (K3). Keep all 11 existing tests green throughout ‚Äî they pin the v0.1 behaviour that must not regress.
- **Bench:** `bench/` harness per K2, run on demand (`pnpm bench`), not in the default CI gate.

## Requirements Traceability

| Requirement | Steps |
|---|---|
| 1 Comments | A1‚ÄìA5 |
| 2 Presence | A1, A4, A5 |
| 3 Settings + palette | B1‚ÄìB4 |
| 4 Syntax colouring | C1‚ÄìC2 |
| 5 MDX execution | D1‚ÄìD4 |
| 6 Mermaid + math | D3, E1‚ÄìE2 |
| 7 Table grid | F1‚ÄìF2 |
| 8 Fold menu | B1, G1‚ÄìG2 |
| 9 Footnotes + def lists | H1‚ÄìH2 |
| 10 Caret-level reveal | IJ1, IJ5 |
| 11 Virtualization + IME + incremental | IJ1‚ÄìIJ4 |
| 12 Streaming completion | K1 |
| 13 Benchmarks + a11y + budget | K2‚ÄìK3 |
| Docs/demo in step | A5, B4, K4 |

## Verify

- Per phase: `pnpm typecheck && pnpm test`, then `pnpm e2e` (demo auto-served per `playwright.config.ts`); manual pass in the demo at http://localhost:5178 across light/dark and all four modes.
- Security-sensitive phases (C, D, E): re-run the XSS e2e (`e2e/editor.spec.ts` test 7) plus the new escape suites.
- Release close (K): `pnpm build`, size script, bench run, FEATURES/README audit.

## Out of scope

- Real-time CRDT co-editing and any network transport (comments/presence are data-in/events-out only ‚Äî SPEC ¬ß14 keeps it *possible*).
- Bundling mermaid, KaTeX, esbuild-wasm, or swc ‚Äî all host-supplied.
- Full-grammar syntax highlighting or a heavier read-mode highlighter (SPEC ¬ß16 open question stays open).
- MDX `{expression}` evaluation beyond the constrained subset's interpolation; arbitrary-statement ESM execution hardening beyond the sandbox boundary.
- Character-level reveal in `preview` mode (stays block click-to-edit by design).
